src: A gray bear statue is on a flat rock with a pedestal, within a forested area, mid-step. Tall trees with textured bark and ground foliage are behind, sunlight and shadows enhance the sculpture's details.
edit: A vibrant bear statue stands boldly on a large, vivid flat rock with a rectangular pedestal set within a forested area. The bear appears mid-step. Tall trees with bright, exaggerated textures and scattered colorful ground foliage frame the scene. Electric hues of sunlight stream through the trees, casting lively shadows that highlight the sculpture's bold details in Pop-Art style.
